subcodes.title: Khoekhoegowab: GAGASI/GAIB
subcodes.first_line:
## Khoekhoegowab: GAGASI/GAIB

Ti Elōtse! Khoa-Khoa ê ≠hî-≠hî ti gagasa, !anu-!anu ti ≠gaoba. Ti ≠âite suwu-suwuba te re
subcodes.notes: Theory: Khoekhoegowab morning/purity prayer (section GAGASI/GAIB) -- "Ti Elotse! Purify my heart, sanctify my spirit..." Morning prayer, possibly BH00009SHE or similar. Challenge: Khoisan click consonants.
